raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The income-based utility charge is described as a socialist billing scheme by Senate Minority Leader Brian W. Jones.",
    "Customers should be charged based on usage, not income, according to Senate Minority Leader Brian W. Jones.",
    "Senate Bill 1326 aims to safeguard family budgets and ensure the affordability of utility bills across California.",
    "Senate Bill 1326 advocates for utility bills to be based on energy usage rather than a family's income.",
    "This approach to utility billing is claimed to make energy costs more predictable and manageable for families.",
    "Senate Bill 1326 is designed to repeal the provisions of the Democrat Assembly Bill 205 (2022) that allow for income-based fixed charges.",
    "AB 205 was described as rushed and flawed legislation by Senate Minority Leader Brian W. Jones.",
    "Many Democrats who initially supported AB 205 are now reversing course and calling to stop the income-based charge.",
    "Senate Bill 1326 has an urgency clause for it to take effect immediately upon being signed into law."
  ]
}
```
